sourceFieldGuide.payment_type: Prefers the Payment Type Excel column and falls back to Payment Details 01 -> Payment Type.
sourceFieldGuide.product: Derived field from Payment Details 02 -> Product; not a direct Excel header.
sourceFieldGuide.vendor: Derived from Payment Details 02 -> Which Supplier, with fallback to the vendor column when present.
sourceFieldGuide.reason: Internal field mapped from the Reasons for payment Excel column.
sourceFieldGuide.payment_detail_02_text: Raw full text captured from the Payment Details 02 Excel column.

vendor_ref_text.notes: Direct vendor mapping from the parsed vendor field.

location_ref_text.notes: Try Location first, then Project Type as an alternate location source.

class_ref_text.notes: Belongs To maps directly to class/department selection.

account_ref_text.notes: payment_type prefers the Payment Type column and falls back to Payment Details 01 -> Payment Type; Payment Details 02 and Reasons for payment are primary evidence for account selection, while the other fields are supporting signals.
